mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId, LOGIN_ID AS loginId, PASSWORD AS password, NICKNAME AS nickname, SKIN_TYPE AS skinType, SKIN_CONCERN AS skinConcern, ROLE AS role, TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM BL_MEMBERS WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{_parameter}

SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId, LOGIN_ID AS loginId, PASSWORD AS password, NICKNAME AS nickname, SKIN_TYPE AS skinType, SKIN_CONCERN AS skinConcern, ROLE AS role, TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM BL_MEMBERS WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId} AND PASSWORD = #{password}

SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId, LOGIN_ID AS loginId, PASSWORD AS password, NICKNAME AS nickname, SKIN_TYPE AS skinType, SKIN_CONCERN AS skinConcern, ROLE AS role, TO_CHAR(REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS regDate FROM BL_MEMBERS WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{_parameter}
